## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential co-marketing and research collaboration opportunities between GrowthX AI and Peec AI in the field of Generative AI Optimization (GEO).](https://fathom.video/share/KsotsoMsX617zkqTfaUkVeH4WrQvHfQy?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Both companies are actively investing in GEO-related content creation and thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/KsotsoMsX617zkqTfaUkVeH4WrQvHfQy?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [There's mutual interest in organizing joint workshops/webinars to share insights on GEO tactics and data](https://fathom.video/share/KsotsoMsX617zkqTfaUkVeH4WrQvHfQy?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Potential for collaborative content creation leveraging Peec AI's data insights and GrowthX AI's distribution channels](https://fathom.video/share/KsotsoMsX617zkqTfaUkVeH4WrQvHfQy?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)
  - [Discussion of current GEO landscape, including challenges in prompt tracking and content optimization for language models](https://fathom.video/share/KsotsoMsX617zkqTfaUkVeH4WrQvHfQy?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)

## Topics

### Company Backgrounds and Current Initiatives

  - [GrowthX AI: Agency serving major SaaS companies in the US, focusing on GEO monitoring and actionable insights](https://fathom.video/share/KsotsoMsX617zkqTfaUkVeH4WrQvHfQy?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Peec AI: Recently raised $7M seed, at $1.5M ARR, growing by \~$200k/week, launched self-serve 3-4 weeks ago](https://fathom.video/share/KsotsoMsX617zkqTfaUkVeH4WrQvHfQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
  - [Both companies investing heavily in content creation and thought leadership in the GEO space](https://fathom.video/share/KsotsoMsX617zkqTfaUkVeH4WrQvHfQy?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)

### Content Partnership Opportunities

  - [GrowthX AI seeking partner for creating high-quality, data-driven GEO content](https://fathom.video/share/KsotsoMsX617zkqTfaUkVeH4WrQvHfQy?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Peec AI has a CMO with extensive SEO/GEO experience, currently building out content team](https://fathom.video/share/KsotsoMsX617zkqTfaUkVeH4WrQvHfQy?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Potential for joint workshops, webinars, and follow-up content creation](https://fathom.video/share/KsotsoMsX617zkqTfaUkVeH4WrQvHfQy?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [GrowthX AI workshops typically attract 400-600 attendees, mostly from their Ideal Customer Profile (ICP)](https://fathom.video/share/KsotsoMsX617zkqTfaUkVeH4WrQvHfQy?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)

### Current GEO Landscape and Challenges

  - [Lack of comprehensive, non-sales-driven content about GEO tactics and best practices](https://fathom.video/share/KsotsoMsX617zkqTfaUkVeH4WrQvHfQy?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Uncertainty around which prompts to track and how to measure GEO effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/KsotsoMsX617zkqTfaUkVeH4WrQvHfQy?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Need for better understanding of content optimization for language models (e.g., structuring, takeaways, FAQs)](https://fathom.video/share/KsotsoMsX617zkqTfaUkVeH4WrQvHfQy?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Challenges in organizational structure for GEO optimization (traditionally falling to SEO teams)](https://fathom.video/share/KsotsoMsX617zkqTfaUkVeH4WrQvHfQy?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)

### GEO Tactics and Implementation

  - [GrowthX AI uses GEO data to inform content creation strategies for clients](https://fathom.video/share/KsotsoMsX617zkqTfaUkVeH4WrQvHfQy?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Focus on making content more "LLM-friendly" through structure and formatting](https://fathom.video/share/KsotsoMsX617zkqTfaUkVeH4WrQvHfQy?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [Advice on syndication and community engagement to improve citation chances](https://fathom.video/share/KsotsoMsX617zkqTfaUkVeH4WrQvHfQy?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Discussion of earned channels' importance in shaping mentions and citations](https://fathom.video/share/KsotsoMsX617zkqTfaUkVeH4WrQvHfQy?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)

### Industry Trends and Future Outlook

  - [Potential for rapid industry shift if major players (e.g., Google) introduce AI-first search features](https://fathom.video/share/KsotsoMsX617zkqTfaUkVeH4WrQvHfQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [Larger enterprises (e.g., Expedia) already investing heavily in dedicated GEO teams and strategies](https://fathom.video/share/KsotsoMsX617zkqTfaUkVeH4WrQvHfQy?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
  - [Competitive landscape in GEO tooling, with multiple startups raising funds and rapidly developing features](https://fathom.video/share/KsotsoMsX617zkqTfaUkVeH4WrQvHfQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to create a Slack channel for further communication and planning](https://fathom.video/share/KsotsoMsX617zkqTfaUkVeH4WrQvHfQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1250.0)
  - [Noah to discuss potential collaboration with Malte (Peec AI's CMO/GEO expert)](https://fathom.video/share/KsotsoMsX617zkqTfaUkVeH4WrQvHfQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
  - [Explore possibility of Peec AI joining GrowthX AI's upcoming Friday workshop](https://fathom.video/share/KsotsoMsX617zkqTfaUkVeH4WrQvHfQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [Schedule a follow-up call to scope out a joint workshop/webinar, considering both companies' go-to-market motions](https://fathom.video/share/KsotsoMsX617zkqTfaUkVeH4WrQvHfQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
  - [GrowthX AI to share details of Friday's workshop topics and timing with Peec AI](https://fathom.video/share/KsotsoMsX617zkqTfaUkVeH4WrQvHfQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
